title: Ruucy 6 Pcs Collapsible Storage Crates, Folding Plastic Crate 25x16x10cm, Stackable Storage Baskets with White Marker & Stickers, Paste Crates Desktop Storage Box for Office Kitchen Bathroom
features: 【Desktop Organizer】Our package includes 6 folding crate in different colours + 8 Blackboard Labels +1 erasable white markers. With these large foldable pastel crates, you can make your desktop well organised, you will never lose small items and find them easily. Their stackable design allows them to take up very little space, yet can create a neat and tidy work surface.

【Plastic Storage Baskets】The collapsible storage crate are made of high quality PP plastic with smooth edges, non-toxic, odourless, not easy to break or fade, sturdy and durable. It is designed with reinforced grids, stable structure, not easy to deform. And it is easy to view the contents of the box and maintain the ventilation. Built-in invisible handles on both sides to easily move.

【Foldable & Stackable】Assemble or fold quickly without tools. You only need to open the long and short panels on both sides, connect snap of 4 corners to use. Multiple folding plastic baskets can be stacked together to save space and expand for additional storage. There are connecting buckles at the 4 corners to make it more stable when stacked and not easy to fall over. And folded for storage when not in use, saving space.

【1 Erasable Liquid Chalk Markers + 8 Adhesive Labels】The label is flat and sticky and can be used for a long time. Write the classification of the item with a pen on the label and stick it on the storage box, so you can see the classification of the item at a glance. The marker writes smoothly and can be removed with a damp paper towel. Can also be used on glass, metal, wood, blackboard, fluorescent board.

【Multifunction Storage Box】The folding basket with handle, size 25 x 16 x 10cm. It is very suitable for storing mobile phones, remote controls, pens and other small office items, as well as cosmetics, hygiene supplies and crafts in bedrooms, bathrooms and classrooms. They can be placed on shelves, tables or cupboards to keep your items neat and tidy.
